name: JAMBO Premium Triple Water Slide with 3 Bodyboards, 20Ft Heavy Duty Slip Splash and Slides-Advanced 3-Way Sprinkler System, Splash Pad Mat Backyard Summer Outdoor Water Toys n Long Slides for Kids
bullets: 💧 PERFECT SPRINKLER SYSTEM, PERFECT FUN. PATENT-PENDING DESIGN: There are sprinkler holes all around both sides of the slide that are specially designed to give maximum wetness, for maximum wheee! This amazing backyard toy has great water coverage over the whole slide, which will keep kids sliding fast, and eager to soak up the water fun!

💧 MORE LANES FOR MORE FUN: Our wide, three- lane water slide gives kids a way funner sliding experience, where they get the chance to splash around and slide at once for hours and hours of water fun! Less time spent waiting around for a turn- and more time spent sliding and having an awesome time with family and friends. Three kids can slide at once with our blow-up water park. They can have races to see who’s faster, splash around or show off new tricks they learned on the boogie board.

💧 PATENT PENDING - LONG-LASTING, PREMIUM DESIGN: We researched and tested other slides to see how we could make improvements. Our lawn tarp slide is made from thick, industrial-grade PVC that is much stronger than most lawn water slides on the market. Roll it up and pack it away at the end of summer. It will be ready to go year after year!

💧 INCLUDES 3 BODY BOARDS TO SLIDE & RIDE ON: Not all waterslides are created equal! Most water slides only come with the slide and no other accessories. Don’t settle for that! Body boards provide a much more fun sliding experience. Jambo includes them for you, so that you don't have to spend extra money getting the slide accessories you want & need. You deserve the best. Our brilliant slip and slide waterslide pad comes with three bodyboards to ride on! A whole lot of backyard toys all in one!

💧 SAFETY FIRST: The JAMBO Slip Splash and Slide water slide is designed with safety in mind. ASTM and CPSIA certified, our waterslide is BPA and phthalates free. This outdoor water toy also has a crash pad at the end of the slide to slow children down and ensure safety.

💧 EASY SETUP FOR INSTANT BACKYARD EXCITEMENT: Setting up your JAMBO Slip Splash and Slide is a breeze—just roll it out, secure it with the included anchors, attach a standard garden hose, and let the waterworks begin! No stress, no tools, just non-stop fun in minutes. It’s the perfect way to turn any backyard into a water park for unforgettable summer memories.

reviews.name: George Anderson
reviews.title: So much fun and held up great!
reviews.body: I bought the JAMBO Premium 24Ft Slip Splash and Slide for my kids, and it ended up being a huge hit with the whole family. Setup was quick and easy—just laid it out on the lawn, connected the hose, and the built-in sprinkler system provided plenty of water to keep the slide slick.

reviews.name: Synita Brown
reviews.title: Title: Big Summer Fun with This Jumbo Slip and Slide
reviews.body: I’m really impressed with this jumbo slip and slide! It’s the perfect addition for outdoor fun and kept everyone entertained for hours. The size gives plenty of room to slide, and the material feels durable enough to handle lots of use. Setup was easy, and it provided a fun way to cool off on hot summer days. It’s great for kids, family gatherings, and backyard activities. I would definitely recommend this slip and slide for anyone looking to add some excitement to their summer.

reviews.name: J Carroll
reviews.title: Short lived fun
reviews.body: I bought this for my grandkids. They loved it and had lots of fun, but it broke/popped during the first use.

reviews.name: Derek wilson
reviews.title: Replaced our busted slip and slide and the kids are obsessed
reviews.body: Our old slip and slide ripped right down the middle and you would have thought the world ended the way the kids reacted. Ordered this one with Prime overnight and it showed up the next morning, which saved the weekend.
